title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
lyrics: Twinkle, twinkle, little star, how I wonder what you are. Up above the world so high, like a diamond in the sky. Twinkle, twinkle, little star, how I wonder what you are.
image_prompt: cute cartoon night sky with twinkling stars and a smiling moon, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Baa Baa Black Sheep
lyrics: Baa, baa, black sheep, have you any wool? Yes sir, yes sir, three bags full. One for the master, one for the dame, and one for the little boy who lives down the lane.
image_prompt: cute cartoon black sheep on a green hill, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Row Row Row Your Boat
lyrics: Row, row, row your boat, gently down the stream. Merrily, merrily, merrily, merrily, life is but a dream.
image_prompt: cute cartoon boat floating on a calm river, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Itsy Bitsy Spider
lyrics: The itsy bitsy spider climbed up the water spout. Down came the rain and washed the spider out. Out came the sun and dried up all the rain, and the itsy bitsy spider climbed up the spout again.
image_prompt: cute cartoon friendly spider on a water spout with sunshine, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Old MacDonald Had a Farm
lyrics: Old MacDonald had a farm, E-I-E-I-O. And on his farm he had a cow, E-I-E-I-O. With a moo moo here and a moo moo there, here a moo, there a moo, everywhere a moo moo. Old MacDonald had a farm, E-I-E-I-O.
image_prompt: cute cartoon farm with a happy cow and red barn, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Head Shoulders Knees and Toes
lyrics: Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes. Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes. And eyes and ears and mouth and nose. Head, shoulders, knees and toes, knees and toes.
image_prompt: cute cartoon child pointing to head shoulders and toes, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: This Little Piggy
lyrics: This little piggy went to market, this little piggy stayed home. This little piggy had roast beef, this little piggy had none. And this little piggy went wee wee wee all the way home.
image_prompt: cute cartoon row of five little pink piglets, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Hickory Dickory Dock
lyrics: Hickory dickory dock, the mouse ran up the clock. The clock struck one, the mouse ran down, hickory dickory dock.
image_prompt: cute cartoon mouse climbing a big clock, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Jack and Jill
lyrics: Jack and Jill went up the hill to fetch a pail of water. Jack fell down and broke his crown, and Jill came tumbling after.
image_prompt: cute cartoon children walking up a green hill with a pail, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Humpty Dumpty
lyrics: Humpty Dumpty sat on a wall, Humpty Dumpty had a great fall. All the king's horses and all the king's men couldn't put Humpty together again.
image_prompt: cute cartoon egg character sitting on a stone wall, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Mary Had a Little Lamb
lyrics: Mary had a little lamb, its fleece was white as snow. And everywhere that Mary went, the lamb was sure to go.
image_prompt: cute cartoon girl walking with a fluffy white lamb, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Rock a Bye Baby
lyrics: Rock a bye baby, on the tree top. When the wind blows, the cradle will rock. When the bough breaks, the cradle will fall, and down will come baby, cradle and all.
image_prompt: cute cartoon baby cradle gently hanging from a tree branch, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Pat-a-Cake
lyrics: Pat-a-cake, pat-a-cake, baker's man. Bake me a cake as fast as you can. Roll it and pat it and mark it with a B, and put it in the oven for baby and me.
image_prompt: cute cartoon baker with a fresh cake, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Wheels on the Bus
lyrics: The wheels on the bus go round and round, round and round, round and round. The wheels on the bus go round and round, all through the town.
image_prompt: cute cartoon yellow school bus driving through town, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes

title: Five Little Ducks
lyrics: Five little ducks went out one day, over the hills and far away. Mother duck said quack, quack, quack, quack, but only four little ducks came back.
image_prompt: cute cartoon mother duck with little ducklings by a pond, children's book illustration, colorful, simple shapes
